summary: Iteration 57: Verified Elite Calibration Engine v3 with 5 post-consensus corrections. All 23 unit tests passed testing: (1) Market blend math (35% AI / 65% market), (2) Edge threshold labels (STRONG/LEAN/LOW), (3) Historical error correction with 10+ sample threshold, (4) Recommendation flip guard with 15+ sample and 45% threshold, (5) Confidence recalibration. Integration tests confirmed both /api/predict and /api/basketball/predict endpoints work without crashing and return edgeStrength and calibrationApplied fields.
seed_data_creation: None - used mock data for unit tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified elite calibration engine. Key findings: (1) All 5 correction functions work correctly with mock data, (2) Constants verified: MIN_SAMPLES_FOR_CORRECTION=10, MIN_SAMPLES_FOR_FLIP=15, MARKET_WEIGHT=0.65, FLIP_THRESHOLD=0.45, EDGE_STRONG_PCT=0.05, EDGE_LEAN_PCT=0.02, (3) Soccer prediction returns edgeStrength=LOW when projection equals line, calibrationApplied=YES, (4) Basketball prediction returns edgeStrength=STRONG with 23.6 projection vs 25.5 line (7.5% edge), calibrationApplied=YES, (5) Preview DB has limited settled picks (15 soccer, 11 basketball) so error correction and flip guard won't trigger in production until more data accumulates.

verified_cases: Falls back to broader bucket if specific missing
Flips when 40% hit rate and opposite is 60%
No flip when opposite not meaningfully better

confidence_recalibration.threshold: 10+ samples in band, AI overconfident by > 8 points
